series_metadata.series_title: Dual Public Employment Form for R.C. 102.04(D) Statement
series_metadata.series_description: The R.C. 102.04(D) Statement form is required to be completed by public employees who are employed by more than one public employer at the same time. This information is required by the R.C. 102.04(D).
